title: cyperus longus subsp. tenuiflorus
intro: Cyperus longus subsp. tenuiflorus, also known as the slenderflower flatsedge, is a subspecies of the Cyperus longus plant, which is a type of sedge that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus longus subsp. tenuiflorus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and processing the roots and rhizomes, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
